Discussion Here we present a comprehensive atlas of human and mouse WAT across depot and body mass. Our analysis reveals a rich array of cell types, including blood and lymphatic vascular cells, immune cells, and ASPCs, in addition to adipocytes. These cell types are grossly similar across species, but differ more profoundly when cellular subpopulations are explored. It is te

array of cell types, including blood and lymphatic vascular cells, immune cells, and ASPCs, in addition to adipocytes.
